scripts.prepublish.github: pnpm build && git add dist/** && git commit -m "chore: update generated files" || true
scripts.publish.github.patch: pnpm prepublish.github && dotenvx run -- pnpm version patch && pnpm publish --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com
scripts.publish.github.minor: pnpm prepublish.github && dotenvx run -- pnpm version minor && pnpm publish --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com
scripts.publish.github.major: pnpm prepublish.github && dotenvx run -- pnpm version major && pnpm publish --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com
scripts.publish.github.gh.patch: pnpm prepublish.github && dotenvx run -- pnpm version patch && pnpm publish --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && git push origin --tags && gh release create "$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)" --title "$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)" --notes "Release $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)"
scripts.publish.github.gh.minor: pnpm prepublish.github && dotenvx run -- pnpm version minor && pnpm publish --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && git push origin --tags && gh release create "$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)" --title "$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)" --notes "Release $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)"
scripts.publish.github.gh.major: pnpm prepublish.github && dotenvx run -- pnpm version major && pnpm publish --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && git push origin --tags && gh release create "$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)" --title "$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)" --notes "Release $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)"
scripts.publish.github.gh: pnpm publish --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && git push origin --tags && gh release create "$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)" --title "$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)" --notes "Release $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)"
